summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tools feature implementation. Backend authentication APIs working perfectly. Frontend Tools page and Quick Tools sidebar functionality tested successfully with both calculators working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Minor selector issue when navigating between tools in sidebar - 'View All Tools' link selector timeout

passed_tests: Navigation to Tools page after login
Tools page loading with both calculators
Fuel Surcharge Calculator - input validation and calculation
IFTA Fuel Tax Estimator - multiple jurisdictions and calculation
Quick Tools sidebar toggle button visibility
Quick Tools sidebar hidden on Tools page (correct behavior)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% - All major functionality working, minor navigation issue in sidebar
